title: BEM-609 fix YAML and commits
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
triggers=Path('governance/triggers'); triggers.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

script=scripts/'claude_primary_provider_gate.py'
script.write_text(sep.join([
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import json',
'import os',
'from pathlib import Path',
'SEP = bytes.fromhex("0a").decode("ascii")',
'OUT = Path("governance/provider_gates/bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate_result.json")',
'REPORT = Path("governance/reports/bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate_result.md")',
'def truth(value):',
'    return bool(str(value or "").strip())',
'has_claude = truth(os.environ.get("CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN"))',
'has_anthropic = truth(os.environ.get("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"))',
'status = "primary_candidate_secret_present" if has_claude else "primary_not_proven"',
'selected = "claude_code_candidate" if has_claude else "gpt_reserve"',
'reserve_used = False if has_claude else True',
'reason = "CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN is present. Primary provider is candidate, but runtime/limits still require Claude smoke response." if has_claude else "Claude primary runtime not proven by this gate; using reserve unless Claude audit response appears."',
'result = {',
'  "schema_version": "provider_gate_result.v1",',
'  "bem": "BEM-605",',
'  "gate_id": "bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate",',
'  "provider_checked": True,',
'  "primary_provider": "claude_code",',
'  "reserve_provider": "gpt_python_executor",',
'  "selected_provider": selected,',
'  "reserve_used": reserve_used,',
'  "has_claude_code_oauth_token": has_claude,',
'  "has_anthropic_api_key": has_anthropic,',
'  "reason": reason,',
'  "proof_file": str(OUT),',
'  "checked_at": "workflow_runtime",',
'  "status": status,',
'  "blocker": None',
'}',
'OUT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'OUT.write_text(json.dumps(result, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'REPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'REPORT.write_text("# BEM-608 | Claude Primary Provider Gate Result" + SEP + SEP + "Status: " + status + SEP + "Selected provider: " + selected + SEP + "Reserve used: " + str(reserve_used) + SEP + "Claude Code token present: " + str(has_claude) + SEP + "Anthropic key present: " + str(has_anthropic) + SEP + SEP + "Secrets were not printed." + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'print(json.dumps({"status": status, "selected_provider": selected, "reserve_used": reserve_used}, ensure_ascii=False))'
])+sep)

provider_workflow=wfs/'claude-primary-provider-gate.yml'
provider_workflow.write_text('''name: Claude Primary Provider Gate

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/triggers/claude_primary_provider_gate.trigger'
      - 'scripts/claude_primary_provider_gate.py'
      - '.github/workflows/claude-primary-provider-gate.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: claude-primary-provider-gate
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  check-claude-provider:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check provider gate script
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/claude_primary_provider_gate.py

      - name: Write provider gate result
        env:
          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
        run: python3 scripts/claude_primary_provider_gate.py

      - name: Commit provider gate result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/provider_gates/bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate_result.json governance/reports/bem608_claude_primary_provider_gate_result.md
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-609 Claude primary provider gate result"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')

# Normalize fragile commit steps in router/dispatcher workflows.
workflow_commit_adds={
 'mailbox-dispatcher.yml':'governance/state/mailbox_dispatcher_state.json governance/reports/mailbox_dispatcher_result.md',
 'operator-decision-dispatcher.yml':'governance/state/operator_decision_dispatcher_state.json governance/reports/operator_decision_dispatch_result.md',
 'operator-reply-intake.yml':'governance/state/operator_reply_intake_state.json governance/operator_decisions governance/tasks/pending governance/reports/operator_reply_intake_result.md',
 'decision-curator-handoff.yml':'governance/state/decision_curator_handoff_state.json governance/curator/inbox governance/reports/decision_curator_handoff_result.md',
 'curator-inbox-router.yml':'governance/state/curator_inbox_router_state.json governance/role_orchestrator/inbox governance/tasks/pending governance/reports/curator_inbox_router_result.md',
 'role-orchestrator-internal-router.yml':'governance/state/role_orchestrator_internal_router_state.json governance/internal_contour governance/tasks/pending governance/reports/role_orchestrator_internal_router_result.md'
}
changed=[]
for name, add_paths in workflow_commit_adds.items():
    path=wfs/name
    if not path.exists():
        continue
    text=path.read_text(errors='ignore')
    marker='      - name: Commit '
    idx=text.find(marker)
    if idx<0:
        continue
    prefix=text[:idx]
    title='Commit workflow result'
    if 'Commit ' in text[idx:text.find('\n',idx)]:
        title=text[idx+len('      - name: '):text.find('\n',idx)]
    block='''      - name: '''+title+'''
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add '''+add_paths+'''
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-609 conflict-safe workflow result"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
'''
    new_text=prefix+block
    if new_text!=text:
        path.write_text(new_text)
        changed.append(str(path))

trigger=triggers/'claude_primary_provider_gate.trigger'
trigger.write_text('BEM-609 trigger claude provider gate safe YAML at 2026-05-18 | 06:24 (UTC+3)'+sep)

protocol=protocols/'YAML_AND_COMMIT_FAILURE_HARDENING.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-609 | YAML And Commit Failure Hardening'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:24 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Fixed'+sep+'- Claude provider gate no longer embeds JSON heredoc in YAML.'+sep+'- Provider gate uses Python script.'+sep+'- Router workflows commit before pull/rebase and use autostash-safe pull/push.'+sep+'- Dispatcher/router workflows still avoid committing shared transport results to reduce conflicts.'+sep)

report=reports/'bem609_fix_provider_gate_yaml_and_commit_steps.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-609 | Fix Provider Gate YAML And Commit Steps | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 06:24 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Invalid heredoc YAML removed from `claude-primary-provider-gate.yml`. Commit steps hardened in router workflows.'+sep+sep+'## Changed workflows'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x for x in changed+[str(provider_workflow)]])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+'null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem609_fix_provider_gate_yaml_and_commit_steps','cycle_id':'bem609-fix-provider-gate-yaml-and-commit-steps','source':'gpt','status':'completed','script':str(script),'provider_workflow':str(provider_workflow),'changed_workflows':changed,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 06:24 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem609_fix_provider_gate_yaml_and_commit_steps']={'status':'completed','script':str(script),'provider_workflow':str(provider_workflow),'changed_workflows':changed,'blocker':None}
state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 06:24 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem609_fix_provider_gate_yaml_and_commit_steps.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-609 PASS: provider gate YAML fixed; router commit steps hardened.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(script),str(provider_workflow),str(trigger),str(protocol),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)]+changed)
ops_applied.append('Fixed invalid provider gate YAML by moving logic to Python script and hardened router workflow commit steps')
"""
No issue comments.
